label: Transparent ranunculus layers motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Ranunculus transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete ranunculus flower motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A flower farm ranunculus bloom with many layered butter-yellow and coral-pink petals, subtle leaf-green hints, natural petal texture, and crisp botanical edges. It should clearly read as ranunculus layers.
Composition/framing: centered complete bloom cutout with generous padding, no cropping.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no peony, no rose, no marigold, no bouquet, no hand, no props, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Ranunculus light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Ranunculus, derived from the visible ranunculus bloom cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished dense component-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Ranunculus, Ranunculus Layers, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract butter-yellow petal surfaces, coral-pink active states, leaf-green success, flower-farm warmth, petal-umber depth, and nested petal layers for settings-heavy dashboards, component libraries, and dense product tools.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, dense cards, nested settings panels, data tables, command palette, sidebar, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and token swatches.
Constraints: no generic yellow UI, no unrelated neon colors, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Ranunculus.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Ranunculus dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Ranunculus that feels like the light board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished professional design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Ranunculus, Ranunculus Layers, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve butter-yellow actions, coral-pink active states, cream foregrounds, leaf-green success, petal-umber dark surfaces, and nested dense component coverage.
Constraints: no neon overload, no generic black UI, no unrelated colors, no tiny text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Ranunculus.
